steps.title: Spot what the underlined part explains
steps.content:
The previous sentence defines reduplication in abstract terms: an element of a root word is repeated, sometimes with modification, within another related word.

The underlined part follows immediately and demonstrates this concept at work by identifying the specific repeated element (“ye”) and showing exactly where it appears in both the words mentioned earlier.

steps.title: Match that explanation to the answer
steps.content:
The underlined part elaborates on the abstract definition by exemplifying how reduplication actually works in the Hoocak words already introduced—it shows the mechanism in action rather than translating words, identifying exceptions, or measuring how common the phenomenon is.

This matches choice A — A is correct.
